mapper.sql: id, workspace_id, parent_id, code, name, type, region_code, path, status, revision
mapper.select: SELECT FROM pdp_organization_unit WHERE workspace_id = #{workspaceId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} ORDER BY path, id
mapper.update: UPDATE pdp_organization_unit SET parent_id = #{parentId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, name = #{name}, type = #{type}, region_code = #{regionCode}, path = #{path}, status = #{status}, revision = #{revision} WHERE id = #{id,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND revision = #{revision} - 1
